name: Fellou
description: Agentic AI browser for deep research and end-to-end web automation. Agents plan multi-step tasks, access logged-in accounts, perform research across the internet, and handle desktop file operations with full step-by-step transparency and intervention capabilities.
notes: Launched 2025, prominent in 2026. Uses Browser Use for web automation and Computer Use for desktop tasks. Full transparency with step-by-step planning before execution. Agentic memory enables learning from interactions.
